name_cn:
22 Handbag
New color small size black silver
 Original Box Calfskin👍 Fine and glossy leather,
Soft and durable, both in one
Simple appearance hides many designer's high-end designs, hollowed-out Chanel logo coins, small embellishments elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of retro sentiment, loose and lazy feel! 🍃
Size: 35*37*7cm
